CustomField.formula: CASE( IF( FLOOR(MOD(MONTH(TODAY()) + 5, 12) / 3) + 1 = 1, 4, FLOOR(MOD(MONTH(TODAY()) + 5, 12) / 3) ), 1, DATE( IF(MONTH(TODAY()) <= 3, YEAR(TODAY()) - 1, YEAR(TODAY())), 9, 30 ), 2, DATE( IF(MONTH(TODAY()) <= 3, YEAR(TODAY()) - 1, YEAR(TODAY())), 12, 31 ), 3, DATE(YEAR(TODAY()), 3, 31), 4, DATE(YEAR(TODAY()), 6, 30), DATE(9999, 1, 1) )
CustomField.label: Last quarter end date
